nasb.text: So they seized her, and when she arrived at the entrance of the Horse Gate of the king’s house, they put her to death there.

esv.text: So they laid hands on her, and she went into the entrance of the horse gate of the king’s house, and they put her to death there.

cnv.text: 她走到王宮的馬門入口的時候，眾兵就把她拿住，在那裡把她殺死了。

ccb.text: 他们抓住她，把她带到马匹进出王宫的入口，在那里杀了她。
